note_text: Patient: 34M with hepatic dysfunction and mild tremor. Wilson's disease confirmed by low serum ceruloplasmin, elevated 24-hour urinary copper, and Kayser-Fleischer rings on slit-lamp exam. Hepatology recommends chelation therapy.

gold.diagnosis: Wilson's disease with hepatic dysfunction
gold.imaging_evidence: confirmatory copper studies and Kayser-Fleischer rings

note_text: Patient: 41F with progressive limb weakness, fasciculations, and hyperreflexia. Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis confirmed by EMG showing widespread denervation. Symptoms are progressively declining, affecting speech and mobility. Neurology requests a speech generating assistive device.

gold.diagnosis: Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis confirmed by EMG

note_text: Patient: 27M with hepatosplenomegaly, thrombocytopenia, and bone pain. Gaucher disease confirmed by enzyme assay showing glucocerebrosidase deficiency. Symptomatic organomegaly and bone involvement documented. Requesting enzyme replacement therapy.

gold.diagnosis: Gaucher disease confirmed by enzyme assay

note_text: Patient: 29F with recurrent abdominal pain, angiokeratomas, and neuropathic pain in extremities. Suspected alpha-galactosidase deficiency with lysosomal storage findings; renal and cardiac involvement pending confirmatory genetic testing. Requesting enzyme replacement therapy pending confirmation.

gold.diagnosis: Suspected alpha-galactosidase deficiency with lysosomal storage findings

note_text: Patient: 8M with progressive proximal weakness and calf pseudohypertrophy. Elevated CK noted. Progressive proximal muscular dystrophy pattern with elevated CK; possible Duchenne-type dystrophinopathy pending genetic confirmation. Requesting physical therapy evaluation.

gold.diagnosis: Progressive proximal muscular dystrophy pattern with elevated CK

note_text: Patient: 22F with generalized joint hypermobility with skin hyperextensibility. Connective tissue disorder suspected, possible Ehlers-Danlos pending Beighton scoring and genetic testing. Requesting genetics consultation.

gold.diagnosis: Generalized joint hypermobility with skin hyperextensibility, connective tissue disorder suspected

note_text: Patient: 45M with progressive proximal weakness and respiratory involvement. Acid maltase deficiency suspected, glycogen storage disease pending enzyme assay confirmation. Requesting enzyme replacement therapy pending confirmation.

gold.diagnosis: Progressive proximal weakness with respiratory involvement, acid maltase deficiency suspected

note_text: Patient: 52F with progressive chorea and behavioral disturbance. Possible CAG repeat expansion disorder pending genetic confirmation. Family history of a similar movement disorder in her father. Requesting genetics consultation.

gold.diagnosis: Progressive chorea with cognitive decline, possible CAG repeat expansion disorder

note_text: Patient: 38F with pruritus and jaundice. MRCP shows progressive cholestasis with beaded appearance of bile ducts. Primary sclerosing process suspected pending confirmatory biopsy. Requesting hepatology evaluation.

gold.diagnosis: Progressive cholestasis with beaded appearance of bile ducts, primary sclerosing process suspected
gold.imaging_evidence: MRCP showing beaded bile duct appearance

note_text: Patient: 61M with nephrotic-range proteinuria and cardiac wall thickening on echocardiogram. Amyloid deposition suspected pending confirmatory biopsy. Requesting cardiology and renal evaluation.

gold.diagnosis: Nephrotic-range proteinuria with cardiac wall thickening, amyloid deposition suspected

note_text: Patient: 67M with progressive dyspnea, bibasilar crackles, and HRCT UIP pattern. Idiopathic lung fibrosis suspected pending pulmonology confirmation. Requesting antifibrotic therapy.

gold.diagnosis: Progressive dyspnea with HRCT UIP pattern, idiopathic lung fibrosis suspected

note_text: Patient: 33F with fluctuating ptosis and fatigable muscle weakness worsening through the day. Neuromuscular junction disorder suspected, possible myasthenic process pending antibody confirmation. Requesting ivig therapy.

gold.diagnosis: Fluctuating ptosis with fatigable muscle weakness, myasthenic process suspected

note_text: Patient: 48F with diffuse skin thickening, Raynaud phenomenon, and esophageal dysmotility. Systemic sclerosis-spectrum disorder suspected pending autoantibody confirmation. Requesting rheumatology evaluation.

gold.diagnosis: Diffuse skin thickening with Raynaud phenomenon, systemic sclerosis-spectrum disorder suspected

note_text: Patient: 4F with disproportionate short stature and rhizomelic limb shortening. Skeletal dysplasia suspected pending genetic confirmation. Requesting genetics consultation.

gold.diagnosis: Disproportionate short stature with rhizomelic limb shortening, skeletal dysplasia suspected

note_text: Patient: 19M with recurrent sinopulmonary infections and pancreatic insufficiency. CFTR mutation suspected pending sweat chloride confirmation. Requesting pulmonology evaluation.

gold.diagnosis: Recurrent sinopulmonary infections with pancreatic insufficiency, CFTR-related process suspected

note_text: Patient: 3F with developmental regression, cherry-red macular spot on exam, and exaggerated startle response. Suspected GM2 gangliosidosis (Tay-Sachs disease) pending confirmatory enzyme assay. Neurology requests genetic counseling and enzyme testing authorization.

gold.diagnosis: Suspected GM2 gangliosidosis (Tay-Sachs disease) pending confirmatory enzyme assay

note_text: Patient: 2M with hepatosplenomegaly, feeding difficulty, and progressive neurodegeneration. Possible Niemann-Pick disease; sphingomyelinase activity pending confirmatory testing. Requesting enzyme replacement therapy evaluation.

gold.diagnosis: Possible Niemann-Pick disease pending confirmatory testing

note_text: Patient: 1M with coarse facial features, corneal clouding, and joint stiffness. Suspected Hurler syndrome (MPS I); awaiting confirmatory enzyme and genetic testing. Requesting enzyme replacement therapy authorization.

gold.diagnosis: Suspected Hurler syndrome (MPS I) awaiting confirmatory testing

note_text: Patient: 4M with coarse facial features and progressive hearing loss without corneal clouding. Query Hunter syndrome (MPS II); genetic testing pending confirmation. Requesting enzyme replacement therapy authorization.

gold.diagnosis: Query Hunter syndrome (MPS II), genetic testing pending confirmation

note_text: Patient: 14M with progressive gait disturbance and adrenal insufficiency. Suspected adrenoleukodystrophy pending confirmatory very-long-chain fatty acid testing. Requesting authorization for disease-modifying therapy.

gold.diagnosis: Suspected adrenoleukodystrophy with adrenal insufficiency pending confirmatory testing

note_text: Patient: 27F with recurrent abdominal pain, neuropathy, and dark urine during episodes. Possible acute intermittent porphyria; urine porphobilinogen testing pending confirmation. Requesting authorization for specialty infusion therapy.

gold.diagnosis: Possible acute intermittent porphyria pending confirmatory testing

note_text: Patient: 38M with progressive dyspnea and early-onset emphysema, nonsmoker. Suspected alpha-1 antitrypsin deficiency; serum level and phenotype testing pending confirmation. Requesting authorization for augmentation therapy.

gold.diagnosis: Suspected alpha-1 antitrypsin deficiency pending confirmatory testing

note_text: Patient: 19M tall stature with arachnodactyly and lens dislocation. Suspected Marfan syndrome; echocardiogram for aortic root dilation pending confirmation. Cardiology requests authorization for surveillance imaging.

gold.diagnosis: Suspected Marfan syndrome pending confirmatory testing

note_text: Patient: 6M with recurrent painful vaso-occlusive episodes and anemia. Possible sickle cell disease; hemoglobin electrophoresis pending confirmation. Requesting authorization for disease-modifying therapy.

gold.diagnosis: Possible sickle cell disease pending confirmatory testing

note_text: Patient: 33F with progressive distal muscle weakness, myotonia, and cataracts. Suspected myotonic dystrophy; genetic testing for CTG repeat expansion pending confirmation. Requesting authorization for specialty neuromuscular evaluation.

gold.diagnosis: Suspected myotonic dystrophy pending confirmatory genetic testing
